review_notes: The functions proposed are relevant to the control SI-4(25) as they focus on optimizing network traffic analysis and visibility within a Kubernetes environment. The use of network policies and service meshes like Istio or Linkerd aligns with the control's intent. Audit logging is also a valid approach to capture network-related activities. Naming conventions are mostly followed, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of 'servicemesh' as a single word to align with Kubernetes resource naming conventions.
title: System Monitoring - System monitoring | optimize network traffic analysis provide visibility into ne
step1_reasoning: The control SI-4(25) focuses on optimizing network traffic analysis to provide visibility. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network policies and service mesh capabilities that provide insights into network traffic. NetworkPolicies can be used to control and monitor traffic flow between pods, while service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can provide detailed telemetry and traffic analysis. Additionally, Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture network-related activities.
